# Free Enemy Pixel Pack for Top-Down Game

- Source: https://free-game-assets.itch.io/free-enemy-pixel-pack-for-top-down-defense
- Creator: Free Game Assets / CraftPix
- Downloaded: 2026-07-23
- License: CraftPix Freebie License permits personal and commercial projects, modification, and distribution as part of a game. Attribution is not required. Source-art resale or redistribution is prohibited.
- Imported subset: side-facing run/fly and attack PNG sheets for enemy characters 1, 2, and 3.
- Project use: grey rock rat, mounted spear fighter, and mechanical ballista enemy visuals.

Do not redistribute these source files as a standalone asset pack.
